name: @aily-project/board-luatos-esp32c3-core
description: The LuatOS ESP32-C3 Core is a compact development board by OpenLuat based on the ESP32-C3 RISC-V chip, featuring Wi-Fi and BLE 5.0 connectivity, dual onboard LEDs, and a breadboard-friendly form factor for IoT application development.
author: OpenLuat
